title: Webtoon-Based Live-Action Series The Legend of Kitchen Soldier Reveals Teaser Video, Poster
content: The upcoming live-action The Legend of Kitchen Soldier series based on the webtoon of the same name released on Thursday its teaser trailer, highlighting a stark contrast in military life before and after the arrival of its protagonist. The staff also revealed a poster for the series on Tuesday.
author: ANN

title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Switch 2 Game's Overview Trailer Previews Creature Discovery, Worlds
content: Nintendo began streaming on Thursday an overview trailer for the Yoshi and the Mysterious Book game. The video previews Yoshi's abilities, creature discovery, worlds, villains Bowser Jr. and Kamek, and amiibo support: The game launches for Nintendo Switch 2 on May 21. In the game, Yoshi jumps into a magical book.
author: ANN

title: Soul Eater Teases Big Announcement As Fans Wait For a Remake
content: Throughout anime’s history, there have been numerous franchises that fans have been dying to see return to the small screen. One of the biggest asks from anime fans has been a new Soul Eater series, which makes sense when you look at the history of the television series.
author: ComicBook

title: I Grew the Greatest Home Garden with my OP Cultivation Skill? Manga Ends
content: Square Enix 's Manga UP! website published the fourth and final part of the final chapter of Suzumi and Shichio Kuzu 's I Grew the Greatest Home Garden with my OP Cultivation Skill? ( Saibai Cheat de Saikyō Saien: Eh, Tada no Katei Saien Desu Kedo? ) manga on Thursday. Square Enix 's Manga UP!
author: ANN

title: Tezuka's Ribbon no Kishi Gets New Anime Film After 27 Years, Streaming on Netflix This August
content: A new anime film based on Osamu Tezuka’s Ribbon no Kishi ( Princess Knight ) has been announced, marking the franchise’s first new anime project in 27 years. Titled THE RIBBON HERO , the film is set for a global release on Netflix this August.
author: Anime Corner

title: Netflix, Twin Engine Produce The Ribbon Hero Anime Film Based on Tezuka's Princess Knight
content: Netflix announced on Thursday that it and Twin Engine are producing a new anime film titled The Ribbon Hero , based on Osamu Tezuka 's Princess Knight ( Ribbon no Kishi ) manga that will debut on Netflix worldwide in August 2026.
author: ANN

title: Cannes to Showcase Live-Action Look Back Film, 'You, Fireworks, and Our Promise' Anime Film
content: The "Goes to Cannes" series is organized by the Marché du Film, the marketplace held during Cannes, and is a series of seven showcases of works in progress from festivals and markets all over the world. This year the "Goes to Cannes" series will offer two rewards.
author: ANN

title: The World's Finest Assassin Season 2 Reveals Key Visual and Teaser Trailer, 2027 Release
content: The World’s Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat Season 2 anime revealed a key visual and retrospective teaser trailer, along with a 2027 release date. Studio SILVER LINK is returning to animate, along with Masafumi Tamura as director. The sequel was announced in September 2023.
author: Anime Corner

title: The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in a Different World as an Aristocrat 2nd Season Anime Reveals 2027 Debut
content: Kadokawa revealed on Thursday the teaser visual, returning cast and staff members, and 2027 debut for the second season of the television anime of Rui Tsukiyo and Reia 's The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in a Different World as an Aristocrat ( Sekai Saikō no Ansatsusha, Isekai Kizoku ni Tensei Suru )…
author: ANN

title: Street Fighter 6 Game's DLC Character Ingrid Launches on May 28
content: CAPCOM announced with a new gameplay trailer for the Street Fighter 6 game on Wednesday DLC character Ingrid will join the game on May 28. Ingrid will join the game as part of the Year 3 Character Pass. The game added Sagat on August 5, the first character in the Year 3 Character Pass. C.
author: ANN
